summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Guinness Atkinson Asia Pacific Dividend Builder ETF (ADIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in Asia Pacific companies expected to have an increase in dividends over time. ADIV was launched on Mar 31, 2006 and is issued by Guinness Atkinson.

holdings.infoBox: ADIV is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are BOC Hong Kong (Holdings) stock at 3.76%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.75%, DBS Group Holdings at 3.59%, NetEase at 3.38%, and Industrial and Commercial Bank of China at 3.33%.
